description: Color photograph of a handheld blue Thermo Scientific TruNarc analyzer device resting on a concrete surface. The device's color screen displays a scan result reading 'Cocaine HCl' with a green checkmark labeled 'OK', a scan number '371', a timestamp '11:15', and a date in January 2026. The lower edge of the device shows the 'thermo scientific' and 'TruNarc' branding. No people are visible.
notable_text: Scan Result; Cocaine HCl; OK; 371; 11:15; thermo scientific TruNarc
